overview: Limra Diagnostic Center is a full-featured medical diagnostic center website for a sonography clinic in Pune, India. It provides online appointment booking, patient and admin dashboards, doctor profiles, and a complete services catalog with role-based access.
features: Online appointment booking with admin approval flow
Patient dashboard with appointment history and profile management
Admin dashboard with analytics, patient and appointment management
Doctor profiles for Dr. Humera Shah, Dr. Naved Shah, and a placeholder
12 sonography services with pricing visible after login
Pregnancy tracker with due date calculator
Mobile-first responsive white and light blue medical design
